title: Runner Bean Salad with Mediterranean Twist
description: A fresh and flavorful salad featuring runner beans, peppery notes, and a mediterranean flair.
instructions: Rinse the runner beans and trim the ends.
In a large bowl, combine the runner beans, Mediterranean salad mix, and peppery feta cheese.
In a small bowl, whisk together the olive oil, lemon juice, salt, and black pepper.
Pour the dressing over the salad and toss to combine.
Chill in the refrigerator for up to 2 hours before serving.
Garnish with additional peppery feta cheese if desired.
Serve as a side dish or add to a bed of greens for a light lunch.
